status: frozen before SmolVLM2 robust route search

data.partition_policy: preserve the existing image-disjoint source split without resampling
data.selection_status: method-selection evidence only; SmolVLM2 single-block discovery is development-only

cache.identity: SmolVLM2 model config + baseline + source manifest + prepared manifests + development-only priors

route.operation: replace each selected vision transformer block with the identity

scouts.selection: seeded SHA-256 ordering within capability+source strata with exact quota balancing; retain every search row in each selected global image group

optimizer.evolution_selection: Pareto front, NSGA-II crowding distance, frozen scalar selection score, then lexicographic route order

objectives.paired_reference: full-model predictions on the identical examples

selection.candidate_pool: deduplicate two development finalists from each of three seeds and evaluate all six on prepared/development-evaluation.jsonl, then advance at most three finalists per objective and K
selection.development_ranking: the matching frozen scalar loss on prepared/development-evaluation.jsonl
selection.ranking: the matching frozen scalar loss on prepared/selection.jsonl

baselines.unpruned_full_model: accuracy reference only; not a same-compute route

external_benchmark.status: not accessed; fresh source-transfer evaluation will be sealed after all SmolVLM2 route selection is frozen
external_benchmark.forbidden_use: route, finalist, K, objective, prompt, decoding, scoring, or hyperparameter selection
